title: 2026 Strategic Initiatives Overview
content:
Company 2026 three strategic initiatives:

Initiative 1: AI Product Line Incubation
  Owner: Wei Chen
  Goal: Complete AI assistant MVP by Q2, launch Beta in Q3, commercial release in Q4
  Key milestones:
  - M1: Technology selection complete (due March 15) Done
  - M2: MVP prototype development (due April 30)
  - M3: Internal beta launch (due June 30)
  Current progress: M1 complete, M2 in progress (60% done)

Initiative 2: International Expansion
  Owner: Na Liu
  Goal: Enter Southeast Asian market in Q2, reach 10% revenue share by Q4
  Key milestones:
  - M1: Market research complete (due March 31)
  - M2: Localization team setup (due May 31)
  - M3: First overseas client signed (due July 31)
  Current progress: M1 80% complete, delay risk

Initiative 3: Operational Efficiency Improvement
  Owner: Lei Zhang
  Goal: Reduce annual operating costs by 15%
  Key milestones:
  - M1: Process automation plan complete (due March 15) Done
  - M2: Automation tool deployment (due May 31)
  - M3: Effectiveness evaluation (due September 30)
  Current progress: M1 complete, M2 started (20% done)
author: ceo
